---
title: "REPORT_TITLE"
subtitle: "REPORT_SUBTITLE"
date: today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    theme: cosmo
    page-layout: full
    grid:
      body-width: 1800px
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
@media (min-width: 1200px) {
  #quarto-content.page-columns {
    display: grid !important;
    grid-template-columns: 250px 1fr !important;
    gap: 2em !important;
  }
  #quarto-sidebar {
    grid-column: 1 !important;
    position: sticky !important;
    top: 1rem !important;
    height: fit-content !important;
  }
  #quarto-document-content {
    grid-column: 2 !important;
    max-width: 100% !important;
  }
}
@media (min-width: 768px) and (max-width: 1199px) {
  #quarto-content.page-columns { display: block !important; }
  #quarto-sidebar {
    position: relative !important;
    width: 100% !important;
    margin-bottom: 2rem !important;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd !important;
    padding-bottom: 1rem !important;
  }
  #quarto-sidebar nav {
    display: flex !important;
    flex-wrap: wrap !important;
    gap: 0.5rem 1.5rem !important;
  }
  #quarto-sidebar nav ul {
    display: flex !important;
    flex-wrap: wrap !important;
    gap: 0.25rem 1.5rem !important;
    padding-left: 0 !important;
    list-style: none !important;
  }
  #quarto-document-content { max-width: 100% !important; }
}
@media (max-width: 767px) {
  #quarto-sidebar { display: none !important; }
  #quarto-document-content { max-width: 100% !important; }
}
.column-body { max-width: 100% !important; }
div.cell-output-display { width: 100% !important; }

.filter-row {
  display: flex !important;
  flex-wrap: wrap !important;
  gap: 1rem !important;
  align-items: flex-end !important;
  margin-bottom: 1rem !important;
}
.filter-row > div {
  flex: 0 0 auto !important;
  min-width: 100px !important;
}
.filter-row form { margin: 0 !important; }
</style>
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// Load data from SQL pipeline outputs
summary = FileAttachment("data/agg_summary.csv").csv({typed: true})
```

## Executive Summary

DESCRIBE_THE_PURPOSE_OF_THIS_ANALYSIS

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// Derive key metrics
totalItems = d3.sum(summary, d => d.count)

md`
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| **Total items** | ${totalItems.toLocaleString()} |`
```

**Download data:** [Summary (CSV)](data/agg_summary.csv)


## Analysis

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// Example: horizontal bar chart
Plot.plot({
  height: 350,
  marginLeft: 200,
  marginRight: 80,
  x: {label: "Count"},
  y: {label: null},
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(summary, {
      y: "category",
      x: "count",
      fill: "category",
      sort: {y: "-x"}
    }),
    Plot.text(summary, {
      y: "category",
      x: "count",
      text: d => d.count.toLocaleString(),
      dx: 5,
      textAnchor: "start"
    }),
    Plot.ruleX([0])
  ]
})
```


## Detail Table

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

Inputs.table(summary, {
  sort: "count",
  reverse: true,
  rows: 25
})
```


## Methodology

### Data Sources

| Source | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| SOURCE_NAME | `data/source_file.csv` -- DESCRIPTION |

### Limitations

1. LIMITATION_1
2. LIMITATION_2
